LAYOUT REQUIREMENTS:
- TWO separate vertical panels side-by-side on a very light gray background.
- TOP of each panel: A centered status icon. Left panel has a Red circle with white X. Right panel has a Green circle with white Checkmark.
- CENTER of each panel: A single, clean, rounded UI card showing the specific UI contrast.
- BOTTOM of each panel: A short, clear caption in plain text explaining the example. Use a smaller font size (e.g., 14px) and allow the text to wrap to multiple lines. DO NOT truncate the text or use ellipsis (...).
- NO OVERALL TITLE text anywhere in the image (like "Bad vs good practice").
- NO INTERNAL LABELS or pointers inside the UI cards unless they are standard UI elements.
- KEEP IT CLEAN and avoid visual clutter.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Minimalist Apple/Dribbble aesthetic.
- Soft shadows, rounded corners (12px).
- Professional system font (San Francisco/Inter).
- Professional UI colors (neutral grays, blue primary, red error, green success).

CONTRAST TO ILLUSTRATE:
- WRONG: Do not remove focus styles without a visible replacement.
- CORRECT: Verify that empty states can be completed using keyboard alone.

LAYOUT REQUIREMENTS:
- TWO separate vertical panels side-by-side on a very light gray background.
- TOP of each panel: A centered status icon. Left panel has a Red circle with white X. Right panel has a Green circle with white Checkmark.
- CENTER of each panel: A single, clean, rounded UI card showing the specific UI contrast.
- BOTTOM of each panel: A short, clear caption in plain text explaining the example. Use a smaller font size (e.g., 14px) and allow the text to wrap to multiple lines. DO NOT truncate the text or use ellipsis (...).
- NO OVERALL TITLE text anywhere in the image (like "Bad vs good practice").
- NO INTERNAL LABELS or pointers inside the UI cards unless they are standard UI elements.
- KEEP IT CLEAN and avoid visual clutter.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Minimalist Apple/Dribbble aesthetic.
- Soft shadows, rounded corners (12px).
- Professional system font (San Francisco/Inter).
- Professional UI colors (neutral grays, blue primary, red error, green success).

CAPTIONS TO INCLUDE IN THE IMAGE (Write exactly this, no ellipsis, allow wrapping):
- Left caption: "Do not remove focus styles without a visible replacement."
- Right caption: "Verify that empty states can be completed using keyboard alone."

- WRONG: Wrong implementation of Accessibility
- CORRECT: Use semantic elements first, then add ARIA only where semantics alone are not enough.

- BOTTOM of each panel: A short, clear caption in plain text explaining the example. Use a smaller font size (e.g., 14px) and allow the text to wrap to multiple lines. DO NOT truncate the text or use ellipsis (...).
- NO OVERALL TITLE text anywhere in the image (like "Bad vs good practice").
- NO INTERNAL LABELS or pointers inside the UI cards unless they are standard UI elements.
- KEEP IT CLEAN and avoid visual clutter.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Minimalist Apple/Dribbble aesthetic.
- Soft shadows, rounded corners (12px).
- Professional system font (San Francisco/Inter).
- Professional UI colors (neutral grays, blue primary, red error, green success).

CAPTIONS TO INCLUDE IN THE IMAGE (Write exactly this, no ellipsis, allow wrapping):
- Left caption: "Wrong implementation of Accessibility"
- Right caption: "Use semantic elements first, then add ARIA only where semantics alone are not enough."

- BOTTOM of each panel: A short, clear caption in plain text explaining the example. Use a smaller font size (e.g., 14px) and allow the text to wrap to multiple lines. DO NOT truncate the text or use ellipsis (...).
- NO OVERALL TITLE text anywhere in the image (like "Bad vs good practice").
- NO INTERNAL LABELS or pointers inside the UI cards unless they are standard UI elements.
- KEEP IT CLEAN and avoid visual clutter.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Minimalist Apple/Dribbble aesthetic.
- Soft shadows, rounded corners (12px).
- Professional system font (San Francisco/Inter).
- Professional UI colors (neutral grays, blue primary, red error, green success).
